name: Fallen into a coma. Slendermasion au
description: Hello everyone!. Im back and just feelt like writing a scenario based on that owl house episode. This one is about slenderman going inside your mind to get you faster out of a coma cuz hes impatient but I might make another one with some of the others. English isn't my native language so there might be grammer errors.
creator: Samsauce
